evals.prompt: I'm a 5-person startup coming from a Google Sheet. Should I use Attio and how do I set it up?
evals.expected_output: Plan recommendation with setup walkthrough for a small team migrating from spreadsheets

assertions.name: plan_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends a specific Attio plan based on team size (Plus for 5 people since Free maxes at 3 seats)

assertions.name: migration_steps
assertions.description: Covers how to move from spreadsheets to Attio: mapping columns to attributes, importing data, connecting email

assertions.name: start_simple
assertions.description: Advises starting with standard objects (People, Companies, Deals) before creating custom objects

assertions.name: email_sync
assertions.description: Mentions connecting email (Gmail/Outlook) for automatic contact creation

evals.prompt: I need to build a custom data model in Attio for tracking investor relationships at my VC firm. How should I structure the objects?
evals.expected_output: Custom object design for VC use case with relationship mapping

assertions.name: custom_objects
assertions.description: Proposes custom objects relevant to VC workflows (e.g., portfolio companies, funds, LPs, or similar entities)

assertions.name: relationships
assertions.description: Explains how to create relationships between objects to model connections (e.g., LP invests in Fund which backs Company)

assertions.name: attributes
assertions.description: Suggests relevant attributes for the custom objects (e.g., funding stage, commitment amount, board seats)

assertions.name: ai_enrichment
assertions.description: Mentions that AI research agents or auto-enrichment can populate company data, noting it may require Pro plan

evals.prompt: My Attio automations aren't working. I set up a workflow to create a task when a deal moves to 'Negotiation' stage but nothing happens.
evals.expected_output: Troubleshooting guide for automation failures with specific checks

assertions.name: check_status
assertions.description: Suggests checking if the automation is published/active (not still in draft)

assertions.name: trigger_conditions
assertions.description: Recommends verifying that trigger conditions match the actual data (field names, stage names match exactly)

assertions.name: run_history
assertions.description: Advises checking the automation's run history or logs for error messages

assertions.name: simplify_first
assertions.description: Recommends simplifying the trigger to isolate the issue before adding complexity back
